case_title: GUERRERO ESPINOZA VS. AARON GRAVELLE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, GUERRERO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAVELLE, AARON DOES 1 TO 5 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3476 18TH STREET, #36, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
